    "provider": "Mistral",

            "ministral-8b-latest"
        ],
        "response": [
            "text",
            "json_object",
            "json_schema"
        ],
        "role": [
            "user",
            "system"
        ],
        "safe_prompt": [
            false,
            true
        ],
        "frequency_penalty": "FLOAT",
        "presence_penalty": "FLOAT",
        "temperature": "FLOAT",
        "top_p": "FLOAT",
        "max_tokens": "INT"
    },
    "request": {
        "method": "SDK",
        "endpoint": "client.chat.complete",
        "sdk_call": {
            "args": [],
            "kwargs": {
                "model": "{{model}}",
                "messages": [
                    {
                        "role": "{{role}}",
                        "content": "{{prompt}}"
                    }
                ],
                "stream": false,
                "frequency_penalty": "{{frequency_penalty}}",
                "presence_penalty": "{{presence_penalty}}",
                "random_seed": "{{seed}}",
                "safe_prompt": "{{safe_prompt}}",
                "temperature": "{{temperature}}",
                "top_p": "{{top_p}}",
                "n": "{{batch}}",
                "max_tokens": "{{max_tokens}}",
                "response_format": {
                    "type": "{{response}}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
